title: firstrun.restart
description: Restart the first-run wizard from Settings. Clears FirstRunState.completed_at and returns existing RegisteredSource rows as prefilled_sources so the wizard working buffer can be hydrated (A7, R-E5). Does NOT delete existing RegisteredSource rows. The working source list is held in localStorage only after this call (R-Buf). Emits an audit.first_run.restarted event.

confirm.description: Must be true. Requires explicit caller intent to prevent accidental restarts.

restarted_at.description: Server-local time the restart was processed.

prefilled_sources.description: Summary of existing RegisteredSource rows to prefill into the wizard working buffer.

events.description: Audit events emitted by this operation.

audit.first_run.restarted.description: Emitted when the wizard is restarted. Payload includes restarted_at and prefilled_source_count.

wizard.not.completed.description: FirstRunState.completed_at is already null. The wizard is not in a completed state and cannot be restarted.
